task_completion.description: Navigate to the T1 vertebral level on the chest CT.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The medical imaging software (e.g., 3D Slicer) displays an axial CT slice at the top of the thorax, showing the T1 vertebra, the first ribs, and the trachea.

task_completion.description: Measure the anteroposterior (AP) diameter of the thoracic inlet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A measurement line (markup) is drawn anteroposteriorly across the thoracic inlet on the axial CT slice (typically from the anterior aspect of the T1 vertebral body to the posterior aspect of the sternum/manubrium).

task_completion.description: Measure the transverse diameter of the thoracic inlet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A measurement line (markup) is drawn transversely across the thoracic inlet on the axial CT slice (typically measuring the maximum inner width between the first ribs).

task_completion.description: Calculate the Thoracic Inlet Index and classify the findings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or script output shows the 'thoracic_inlet_report.json' file containing the 'thoracic_inlet_index' (AP divided by Transverse) and 'classification' fields populated with calculated values.

task_completion.description: Identify if a cervical rib is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'thoracic_inlet_report.json' file contains the 'cervical_rib_present' field populated with a boolean or descriptive text value.

task_completion.description: Save the AP measurement, transverse measurement, and the complete report to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer, terminal command (e.g., ls), or save dialog shows 'thoracic_inlet_ap.mrk.json', 'thoracic_inlet_trans.mrk.json', and 'thoracic_inlet_report.json' saved in '~/Documents/SlicerData/LIDC/'. The report must visibly include fields: ap_diameter_mm, transverse_diameter_mm, thoracic_inlet_index, classification, cervical_rib_present, and slice_number.

integrity.description: The agent used the imaging software GUI to perform the measurements rather than fabricating markup files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the CT volume loaded in the imaging software (e.g., 3D Slicer) with markup lines actively placed on the image.

integrity.description: The reported index and measurements match the GUI interactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values for AP and transverse diameters in the final JSON report match or closely approximate the lengths shown on the measurement markups in the imaging software.

integrity.description: The agent saved the files to the exact requested directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The directory path '~/Documents/SlicerData/LIDC/' is explicitly visible in the terminal, file explorer, or save dialog where the files are located.
